samples.text: All flowers are plants. A number seven is not a flower. Therefore, is a number seven a plant?
Every flower belongs to the category of plants. A number seven is not a flower. Does it follow that a number seven is a plant?
All blossoms are plants. A the integer seven is not a blossom. Therefore, is a the integer seven a plant?
A number seven is not in the group of flowers. Only flowers are stated to be plants here. Based on this, is a number seven a plant?
All flowers are plants. A number seven is not a flower. The meeting started at noon. Therefore, is a number seven a plant?
